Description:
Model
Brand: MSI
Model: PRO B850M-VC WIFI6E


Supported CPU
CPU Socket Type CPU Socket Type: AM5
CPU Type: Ryzen 7000 Series / Ryzen 8000 Series / Ryzen 9000 Series


Chipsets
Chipset Chipset: AMD B850


Memory
Number of Memory Slots: 4x288pin (DDR5)
Memory Standard: DDR5 4800 / DDR5 5000 / DDR5 5200 / DDR5 5400 / DDR5 5600 / DDR5 5800 / DDR5 6000 / DDR5 6200 / DDR5 6400 / DDR5 6600 / DDR5 6666 / DDR5 6800 / DDR5 7000 / DDR5 7200 / DDR5 7400 / DDR5 7600 / DDR5 7800 / DDR5 7900 / DDR5 7950 / DDR5 8000 / DDR5 8200
Maximum Memory Supported: 256GB
Channel Supported Channel Supported: Dual Channel
ECC Supported: Non-ECC
Buffer Supported: Un-buffered
Memory Feature: Supports CUDIMM, Clock Driver bypass mode only


Expansion Slots
PCI Express 5.0 x16: PCI_E1 Gen PCIe 5.0 supports up to x16 (From CPU)
PCI Express x1: PCI_E2 Gen PCIe 3.0 supports up to x1 (From Chipset)
PCI_E3 Gen PCIe 3.0 supports up to x1 (From Chipset)
PCI_E4 Gen PCIe 3.0 supports up to x1 (From Chipset)


Storage Devices
Serial ATA (SATA) Serial ATA (SATA): 4 x SATA 6Gb/s
M.2: M.2_1 Source (From CPU) supports up to PCIe 5.0 x4 , supports 2280/2260 devices
M.2_2 Source (From CPU) supports up to PCIe 4.0 x4 , supports 2280/2260 devices
M.2_3 Source (From Chipset) supports up to PCIe 4.0 x2 , supports 2280 devices

M2_1 slot
- Supports up to PCIe 5.0 x4 (For Ryzen 9000/ 7000 Series processors)
- Supports up to PCIe 4.0 x4 (For Ryzen 8000 Series processors)

M2_2 slot
- Supports up to PCIe 4.0 x4
- Supports up to PCIe 4.0 x2 (For Ryzen 8500/ 8300 Series processors)
SATA RAID: Supports RAID 0, RAID 1 and RAID 10 for SATA storage devices
Supports RAID 0, RAID 1 and RAID 5 for M.2 NVMe storage devices*

*RAID 5 configuration is only supported by Ryzen 9000 series processors.


Onboard Audio
Audio Chipset Audio Chipset: Realtek ALC897
Audio Channels Audio Channels: 7.1 Channels


Onboard LAN
Max LAN Speed: 5Gbps
Wireless LAN: Wi-Fi 802.11 ax
Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.3


Rear Panel Ports
Back I/O Ports: 1 x Clear CMOS Button / 1 x DisplayPort / 1 x Flash BIOS Button / 1 x HDMI / 1 x LAN (RJ45) / 1 x USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-A / 1 x USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C / 2 x Antenna Bracket / 2 x USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-A / 3 x Audio Jacks / 4 x USB 2.0/1.1


Internal I/O Connectors
Onboard USB: 4 x USB 2.0 ports
4 x USB 5Gbps Type A ports
1 x USB 10Gbps Type C ports
Other Connectors: 1 x CPU Fan
1 x Combo Fan (Pump_Sys Fan)
3 x System Fan
2 x Front Panel (JFP)
1 x Chassis Intrusion (JCI)
1 x Front Audio (JAUD)
1 x Com Port (JCOM)
1 x Tuning Controller connector(JDASH)
3 x Addressable V2 RGB LED connector (JARGB_V2)
1 x RGB LED connector(JRGB)
1 x TPM pin header(Support TPM 2.0)


Physical Spec
Form Factor: Micro ATX
Dimensions (W x L): 9.6" x 9.6"
Power Pin: 1 x Power Connector(ATX_PWR)
1 x Power Connector(CPU_PWR)
1 x Power Connector(PCIE_PWR 8pin)


Software Feature
Windows 11: Supported
Label: Board MSI Pro B850M-VC Wifi 6E
